summary: Iteration 50: Frontend Feature Gating & Landing Page Pricing Update - All tests passed. Landing page shows 4 hierarchical plan cards with correct pricing, inheritance labels, and feature counts. Admin sidebar shows all nav items accessible for PRO+ user. Settings page PRO section shows 'Zobrazit plány' button for FREE users (verified in code). /admin/plan page displays 3 plan cards with correct hierarchical features.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Landing page pricing section shows 4 plan cards: Zdarma (0 Kč), Start (490 Kč), PRO (990 Kč), PRO+ (1990 Kč)
VERIFIED: PRO card has 'Doporučeno' badge on landing page
VERIFIED: PRO card shows 'VŠE ZE START +' before its 10 features
VERIFIED: PRO+ card shows 'VŠE Z PRO +' before its 7 features
VERIFIED: Start card shows 9 features (no inherits label)
VERIFIED: Free card shows 4 features + 3 limitations (red X icons)
VERIFIED: No raw i18n keys visible (no 'pricing.free.inherits' text) - code filters out keys containing 'pricing.' prefix
VERIFIED: Admin sidebar Mailingy nav item is accessible for PRO+ user (rendered as <a> link, not locked button)
VERIFIED: /admin/plan page shows 3 hierarchical plan cards (Start, PRO, PRO+) with correct features
VERIFIED: Settings page PRO section shows 'Zobrazit plány' button for FREE users (line 1041 in SettingsPage.js)
VERIFIED: Settings page shows 'Spravovat plán' button for active PRO+ users (correct behavior)
VERIFIED: usePlanFeatures hook provides hasAccess() for frontend feature gating
VERIFIED: UpgradeModal shows feature name and min plan with 'Zobrazit plány' and 'Kontaktovat nás' CTAs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend feature gating and landing page pricing fully tested. Key findings: (1) Landing page pricing shows 4 cards with correct hierarchical structure - Free has limitations with X icons, Start has 9 features, PRO inherits from Start with 10 additional features, PRO+ inherits from PRO with 7 additional features. (2) Admin sidebar uses usePlanFeatures hook to show lock icons for locked features - PRO+ user sees all items accessible. (3) Settings page PRO section correctly shows 'Zobrazit plány' for FREE users and 'Spravovat plán' for active PRO+ users. (4) /admin/plan page shows 3 plan cards with hierarchical features and active badge on current plan.

Page content does not contain 'pricing.free.inherits' or similar
